live.title: Italy vs Northern Ireland - Playoff Semi-finals - 27 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Italy and Northern Ireland meet in a high‑pressure 2026 FIFA World Cup Qualifiers Play‑Off semifinal, with both nations fighting to keep their World Cup dreams alive. For Italy, the stakes are particularly significant. Having missed out on both the 2018 and 2022 World Cups, the Azzurri now fight to avoid a third consecutive absence from global football’s premier tournament. Will Northern Ireland be able to pull an upset? Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Czechia vs Republic of Ireland - Playoff Semi-finals - 27 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Czechia and the Republic of Ireland meet in a finely balanced Play‑Off semifinal that pits Czechia’s technical fluency against Ireland’s trademark resilience and combative discipline. The hosts will aim to dictate play through midfield control, while Ireland seek to capitalize on set‑pieces, defensive solidity, and opportunistic breaks. With both sides fully aware of what a World Cup berth would mean, this clash sets the stage for a tight, physical, and high‑stakes European showdown. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Wales vs Bosnia-Herzegovina - Playoff Semi-finals - 27 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Wales and Bosnia‑Herzegovina square off in a tense Play‑Off semifinal, with both nations fighting to keep their World Cup dream alive. Wales will look to harness the energy of the Cardiff City Stadium and lean on their disciplined defensive structure, while Bosnia‑Herzegovina arrive hungry for a statement performance on the road. A finely balanced clash awaits, with momentum and nerve likely to define who moves one step closer to 2026. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Slovakia vs Kosovo - Playoff Semi-finals - 27 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Slovakia host Kosovo in a compelling Play‑Off duel that pits Slovakia’s structured, possession‑driven approach against Kosovo’s dynamic, fearless attacking identity. The hosts will look to assert control early, but Kosovo’s unpredictability and willingness to take risks ensure a potentially explosive contest. With a World Cup place within reach, both sides enter with urgency and belief, promising a gripping semifinal. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.
